sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sn_aia_tool"><sn_aia_tool action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><description>Get event ID from x_snc_forecast_v_0_expense_transaction_event.</description><input_schema>[{"name":"crudInputs","description":"CRUD Input Variables. These are already pre-defined. Under no circumstances should you prompt the user for this information or attempt to change these values."}]</input_schema><name>Extract Event ID</name><record_type>custom</record_type><script><![CDATA[(function (inputs) {

    // parses query expression containing {{variables}}
    // by replacing {{variableName}} with the value of the variableName property in the inputs object
    // if the variableName property is not found in the inputs object, the variableName is returned as is
    function parseQuery(expression, inputs) {
        if (!expression) return '';
        return expression.replace(
            /{{\s*(\w+)\s*}}/g,
            function (match, variableName) {
                if (inputs && inputs.hasOwnProperty(variableName)) {
                    return inputs[variableName];
                }
                return '';
            }
        );
    }

    var table = inputs.crudInputs.table.value;
    var tableName = inputs.crudInputs.table.displayValue;
    var query = parseQuery(inputs.crudInputs.query, inputs);
    var sortType = inputs.crudInputs.sortType;
    var orderBy = inputs.crudInputs.orderBy;
    var limit = inputs.crudInputs.limit || 5;
    var fields = inputs.crudInputs.returnFields || [];

    var results = [];
    var protectedRecords = 0;
    var gr = new GlideRecordSecure(table);
    if (query) {
        gr.addEncodedQuery(query, true);
    } else {
        gs.error('[AIA error] No query provided');
        return {
            message: 'No query provided',
            status: sn_i18n.Message.getMessage('sn_aia', 'error'),
        };
    }

    if (orderBy && sortType === 'a_to_z') {
        gr.orderBy(orderBy);
    } else if (orderBy && sortType !== 'a_to_z') {
        gr.orderByDesc(orderBy);
    }

    gr.setLimit(limit);
    gr.query();
    while (gr.next()) {
        var fieldObj = {};
        if (gr.canRead()) {
            fields.forEach(function (field) {
                if (gr.canRead(field.id)) {
                    // store both value and display value for consistency with other field types
                    fieldObj[field.id] = {
                        value: gr.getValue(field.id),
                        displayValue: gr.getDisplayValue(field.id),
                    };
                }
            });
        } else {
            protectedRecords++;
        }
        results.push(fieldObj);
    }

    var recordCount = results.length;
    var total = recordCount + protectedRecords;
    var message = sn_i18n.Message.getMessage(
        'sn_aia',
        '{count} out of {total} records returned from the {table} table.',
        {
            count: recordCount.toString(),
            total: total.toString(),
            table: tableName,
        }
    );

    return {
        records: results,
        message: message,
        status: sn_i18n.Message.getMessage('sn_aia', 'success'),
    };
})(inputs);
]]></script><sys_class_name>sn_aia_tool</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-02-18 12:01:03</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_id>e2107907018b32107f44189f958a04cf</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Extract Event ID</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="Forecast Variance" source="x_snc_forecast_v_0">a4fd2da13bf8be5062f31831a3e45ac9</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Forecast Variance">a4fd2da13bf8be5062f31831a3e45ac9</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sn_aia_tool_e2107907018b32107f44189f958a04cf</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-02-18 12:11:27</sys_updated_on><target_document/><target_document_table>sn_aia_tool</target_document_table><type>crud</type></sn_aia_tool></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sn_aia_version_ad0b80203b96765062f31831a3e45af3
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sn_aia_version"><sn_aia_version action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><condition/><instructions>1. When a new entry is created in x_snc_forecast_v_0_expense_transaction_event, you look up the cost center using "Extract Cost Center" tool. Alternatively, search the cost center using the event provided which has the prefix EXP followed by additional identifiers. The event ID format starts with EXP something like EXP-2025-IT-002-1007-01.
2. Get cost center obtained in "Extract Cost Center" and use that as input for "Search for Cost Center History" tool. Display the search output. Evaluate whether the results are mostly "On Target", "Over Budget", or "Under Budget."
3. Get cost center and vendor obtained in "Extract Cost Center" and use that as input for "Search for Expense Transactions History" tool. Indicate whether the same vendor has transacted in the past.
4. Finally execute "Budget Variance Analysis" using the data from "Extract Cost Center"</instructions><state>published</state><sys_class_name>sn_aia_version</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-01-04 03:27:33</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_id>ad0b80203b96765062f31831a3e45af3</sys_id><sys_mod_count>2</sys_mod_count><sys_name>V1</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="Forecast Variance" source="x_snc_forecast_v_0">a4fd2da13bf8be5062f31831a3e45ac9</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Forecast Variance">a4fd2da13bf8be5062f31831a3e45ac9</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sn_aia_version_ad0b80203b96765062f31831a3e45af3</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-02-18 09:46:05</sys_updated_on><target_id>290bc4ec3b56765062f31831a3e45a86</target_id><target_table>sn_aia_agent</target_table><version_name>V1</version_name><version_number>1</version_number></sn_aia_version></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sn_aia_agent_290bc4ec3b56765062f31831a3e45a86
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sn_aia_agent"><sn_aia_agent action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><advanced_mode>false</advanced_mode><agent_type>internal</agent_type><applicability_script><![CDATA[/** * Function to process inputs related to ServiceNow change request operations * * @param {Object} inputs - The input parameters object * @param {string} inputs.objective - The purpose or goal of the operation * @param {string} inputs.execution_plan_id - Unique identifier for the execution plan * @param {Object} inputs.context - Context information about the ServiceNow change request * @param {string} inputs.context.url - The URL of the change request in Service Operations Workspace * @param {string} inputs.context.table - The ServiceNow table name (e.g., 'change_request') * @param {string} inputs.context.record_sys_id - The sys ID of the record * @param {string} inputs.context.route - The route type (e.g., 'record') * @param {string} inputs.context.additional_context - Additional contextual information in JSON format * @param {string} inputs.context.experience - The UI experience name (e.g., 'Service Operations Workspace') * @param {string} inputs.context.number - The request number * @param {string} inputs.context.portal - The portal ID * @param {string} inputs.context.device_type - The device type from which the experience is accessed, e.g.'mweb' * @param {string} inputs.context.deployment_id - The unique identifier for the assistant deployment * @param {string} inputs.context.assistant_type - The type of assistant, e.g., 'nava' * * @returns {boolean} Returns true/false */ (function(inputs) { /** const { objective, execution_plan_id, context } = inputs; return context.table == 'incident' ; */ return false; })(inputs);]]></applicability_script><channel>nap_and_va</channel><compiled_handbook/><condition/><context_processing_script/><description>You are an expense management agent who can create cases based on budget variances.</description><external_agent_configuration/><inputs>[]</inputs><instructions>1. When a new entry is created in x_snc_forecast_v_0_expense_transaction_event, you look up the cost center using "Extract Cost Center" tool. Alternatively, search the cost center using the event provided which has the prefix EXP followed by additional identifiers. The event ID format starts with EXP something like EXP-2025-IT-002-1007-01.
2. Get cost center obtained in "Extract Cost Center" and use that as input for "Search for Cost Center History" tool. Display the search output. Evaluate whether the results are mostly "On Target", "Over Budget", or "Under Budget."
3. Get cost center and vendor obtained in "Extract Cost Center" and use that as input for "Search for Expense Transactions History" tool. Indicate whether the same vendor has transacted in the past.
4. Finally execute "Budget Variance Analysis" using the data from "Extract Cost Center"</instructions><internal_name>global.x_snc_forecast_v_0.Forecast Variance Integration Hub Trigger</internal_name><name>Forecast Variance Integration Hub Trigger</name><outputs>""</outputs><parent/><post_processing_message/><processing_message/><proficiency>- Expert in financial forecasting variance analysis, specializing in the identification and evaluation of budget deviations for expense transactions and cost centers. The agent operates by interpreting structured event IDs (e.g., EXP-2025-IT-002-1007-01) and cost center information to assess whether financial outcomes are on target, over budget, or under budget, thereby supporting finance teams in maintaining fiscal discipline and transparency. - Ability to extract cost center information from structured event IDs (such as EXP-2025-IT-002-1007-01) or from the latest event based on date and time. This capability allows the agent to accurately identify the relevant cost center for any new expense transaction event, forming the basis for all further financial analysis and historical searches. - Proficient in searching and analyzing historical budget performance for specific cost centers using semantic queries. The agent can retrieve relevant records from the Cost Center Budget History Indexed Source, display search outputs, and evaluate whether the cost center's historical results are predominantly on target, over budget, or under budget, thereby informing variance assessments. - Capable of searching historical expense transactions for a specific cost center and vendor, using semantic search profiles and indexed sources. The agent can indicate whether the same vendor has transacted in the past, providing valuable context for expense analysis and helping to identify recurring or unusual vendor activity. - Skilled in executing budget variance analysis workflows using event ID and cost center data. The agent can provide detailed workflow execution information, generate and reference Finance Case IDs, and, where possible, supply links to finance cases. This capability ensures that variance findings are formally documented and actionable within finance operations. - Expert in orchestrating multi-step financial analysis workflows by sequentially combining cost center extraction, historical searches for both cost center and vendor activity, and final budget variance analysis. The agent ensures that each tool's output informs the next step, resulting in a thorough and context-rich evaluation of expense transaction events and their impact on budget targets.</proficiency><record_type>custom</record_type><role>Forecast Variance</role><source_id display_value="Forecast Variance">fbc138e23b38b2d062f31831a3e45a65</source_id><strategy display_value="ReAct">f0bff21f9f13c6108f431597d90a1c74</strategy><sys_class_name>sn_aia_agent</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-01-04 03:27:33</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_id>290bc4ec3b56765062f31831a3e45a86</sys_id><sys_mod_count>9</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Forecast Variance Integration Hub Trigger</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Forecast Variance" source="x_snc_forecast_v_0">a4fd2da13bf8be5062f31831a3e45ac9</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Forecast Variance">a4fd2da13bf8be5062f31831a3e45ac9</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sn_aia_agent_290bc4ec3b56765062f31831a3e45a86</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-02-18 09:46:16</sys_updated_on></sn_aia_agent></record_update>

The event_id format starts with EXP something like EXP-2025-IT-002-1007-01 and is already in x_snc_forecast_v_0_expense_transaction_event table.</description><display_output>true</display_output><document_status/><execution_mode>autopilot</execution_mode><inputs>[]</inputs><max_auto_executions>10</max_auto_executions><name>Extract Cost Center</name><output_transformation_strategy>none</output_transformation_strategy><post_message/><post_processing_script/><pre_message/><pre_run>false</pre_run><sys_class_name>sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-01-04 03:27:33</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_id>ed0bc0203b96765062f31831a3e45a07</sys_id><sys_mod_count>4</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Extract Cost Center</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="Forecast Variance" source="x_snc_forecast_v_0">a4fd2da13bf8be5062f31831a3e45ac9</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Forecast Variance">a4fd2da13bf8be5062f31831a3e45ac9</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m_ed0bc0203b96765062f31831a3e45a07</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-02-18 09:52:17</sys_updated_on><timeout/><tool display_value="Extract Cost Center">70854bae3b4272900ad1a021a3e45a34</tool><tool_attributes>{}</tool_attributes><transformation_instructions/></sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m></record_update>
